Sun Gong (Xian) еӯ«р©ғҷ (р§ҹЁ)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Gong (еӯ«р©ғҷ), styledXian (р§ҹЁ). Second son of Sun Xiu. Oppressed by Sun Hao. Sun Gong was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
